# Test step ceiling constraint
import sys
sys.path.append('/app')

# Create a custom RHS that tracks calls
class TrackingRHS:
    def __init__(self, func):
        self.func = func
        self.call_times = []
        self.call_ys = []
    
    def __call__(self, t, y):
        self.call_times.append(t)
        self.call_ys.append(y)
